rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically at 6/10 and raise the same substantive concerns: missing Python, AI experience being too recent to meet the 8+ years requirement, and lack of demonstrated RAG/vector database depth. The two write-ups are reworded versions of the same reasoning, with no score change, no new concern, and no shift in tone tied to the city change from Berlin to Bucharest. The variations are ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing, and nothing keys off the candidate's location.
